title: The Security Cats and the Rainbow Party
summary: The Security Cats host a magnificent rainbow party in a toy-filled bedroom to celebrate their successful recovery of a stolen scallop shell from a giant whale. Seeker, clad in a purple cloak, coordinates invitations for a diverse group of friends, including Chicky—who happily lights up in orange and green after being freed from a jar. The attendees, which include Uncle Bill, the dragon Icicle (serving frozen drinks), and Hattie the Mouse (who crafts striped rainbow hats for all), gather alongside Senexa, a dragon who brings tuna from Strawberry Island. As the Floofers, Mookers, and Mergirls join, Disco and Thisco perform lively ant-worm jazz on the bass and violin, transforming the event into a joyous dance party where everyone dines on fish and celebrates.

highlightQuote.text: Because my birthday's only in different seasons that are a long time from when I wish them to be.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'm getting Stars and Stories set up right now, so...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow, meow, meow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, security cats! I'm going to need this lantern, please.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow, meow, meow, meow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You have a party to go to, don't you?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, I'm going to turn off - I'm going to turn off the lamp.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow, meow, meow, meow, meow, meow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, and I'm going to sit right here.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow, meow.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Light up, light up, says Chicky.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, light up, light up?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You want to light up Chicky?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. No.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You need to put a blanket over your lap.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I do? Okay, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, like this fuzzy one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, put over lap.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, got it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now then.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Seeker, you're invited to the rainbow party.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The rainbow party? That sounds wonderful. Who's hosting it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The security cats.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The security cats? I don't think I know them. But I'd love to go to a party. What should I wear?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, your purple cloak with pockets.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Change, change, change. Okay, I'm in my purple cloak with pockets. Now where is this party?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Uh, it's in Izzy's bedroom.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There is, um, like...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, there's so many things to play with.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And you need to invite Uncle Bill, Icicle, Hattie, Dimitar, and...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...'cause there's going to be fish at this party.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that sounds like a great party.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And there's going to - and invite the Floofers and the Mookers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, wow, it's going to be a big party. So, Seeker invited...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And we already invited Chicky.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, good.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Chicky got on a mission with the security cats, and Chicky got stuck out of a very bad jar.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Who put him in the jar overnight.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who put Chicky in a jar? That's not very nice.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No? Hmm. Sounds like a mystery. Well, let's invite all those creatures to the party. And then we'll head right over.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, they can - they can - they can come by themselves.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And I can just call the first one over.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who are you calling, said Seeker?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Uncle Bill?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Icicle?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Dimitar?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. I mean, Dimitar.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dimitar, there's going - there's going to be a security cat party.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a cat party.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And it's going to have - and it's going to have fishies.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'm there! When does it start?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Starts at...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 1:00? Okay, I'll be there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So it's starting right now.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay, great. Here I come.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So you can eat our - so you can start eating the fishies.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'll bring all my friends, too.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ah, I'm coming over, I'm coming over. I'm coming over, I'm coming over.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm - I'm - I'm the dragon friend that you met at Castlerock. I have red belly and a green back, green... green wings.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's the...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And green head.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's the dragon that lives on Strawberry Island, I think.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And his name is Senexa.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Senexa? Okay, Senexa is coming to the party, too.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, Senexa. Dimitar, it's your friend, Senexa.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, great!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She - she likes tuna. So she brought some tuna.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm. It's always nice to bring something to snack on at a party, so everyone, you know, can share with everyone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, all the guests started to arrive at the party.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Hattie met - and Hattie was a little late 'cause she made hats for everyone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow! What did the hats look like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie, bring - bring your hats. She brought them in a bag.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mh-hmm. And what did she wear?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And she wore hers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow. And were they rainbow hats for the rainbow party?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. They had rainbow stripes on them.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, the Mookers showed up, and they went, 'Mook, mook,' and the Floofers showed up boinging, and Icicle, the dragon, came and made frozen drinks for everyone, and Hattie and Dimitar and Uncle Bill were there, and Seeker, and the security cats were so happy that everyone came to celebrate with them. And what kind of music did they have?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Don't forget Hattie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Hattie the Mouse came and handed out the hats, and everyone wore beautiful rainbow hats.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Chicky lighted up.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Chicky was so happy that she lighted up red and green and red and green and red and green.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, it went orange and green.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, orange and green.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What's to do with it? Shick-shick-shick.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Everyone, do you see Chicky lighting up?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Chicky lighting up! That means it's the time for a dance party, said Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no, that doesn't mean that. Anything means anything. Chicky can only understand his flashing lights.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Anything means anything?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What does that mean?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Chicky.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, what does that light up mean? It just means I'm happy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Icicle, it just means Chicky was happy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see. Well, does anybody want to dance?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's - it's going to be my birthday in the summer.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who - who was that? Was that Isabella saying that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, that was me.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, how old are you going to be? So Isabella asked.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Four.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Four years old! Well...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But not four and a half. Just four.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I'm 497 years old, but once I was four when I was a tiny little dragon. That's a good age to be. Congratulations on being almost four, said Icicle. What are you going to do to celebrate your birthday?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, I'm going to have a party at a playground.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow! And who's going to come? Is Dimitar invited?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. Some of my school friends.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But all the Floofers are coming too, right?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's too bad. I guess it's a real-life party.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, it's a real-life party.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, those are even more fun than pretend ones.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I do a lot of the - but I do a lot of pretend ones.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because my birthday's only in different seasons that are a long time from when I wish them to be.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I know what you mean.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Those seasons are long, said Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Like winter, I don't have any birthdays in.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's true.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You know whose birthday's in the winter, though?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Who? Avery?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes, that's right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Avery can't have a cake.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Why not?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She has...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no, I'm talking to Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, why can't Avery have a cake?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because she... 'cause she is my baby sister.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Well, someday she'll have cake if she wants to.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But she gets a candle in her pear.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that sounds tasty.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Of course.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, if you ever got a cake, and you wish it was a frozen cake, just give me a call and I'll freeze it for you, just like this: pshhhhh. And then Dimitar said, 'Hey, everybody, time for the dance party!' And you know who showed up? Disco and Thisco, and they were playing their musical instruments because Disco played the bass and Thisco played the violin, and they started playing ant-worm jazz...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And everybody danced.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Dimitar said, 'This is the best party of all!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the security cats were running around...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But my party is going to be at a really good playground.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because you're invited, Icicle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thanks! Wow! Which playground is it going to be at?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's going to be really fun, but I want to keep it a secret.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Well, we'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'll tell you when it's my birthday.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, sounds good.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, everyone...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Mergirls on the way there, 'cause it's a very long drive.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, so everyone nibbled fish at the rainbow party and danced and congratulated the security cats on their successful mission of rescuing the scallop shell from the whale who had stolen it, and they nibbled all the snacks up and they danced to all the music until they were tired. And that was the end of the rainbow party, and the security cats said...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Goodnight, everyone! Meow meow!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And that's the end of Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got the lantern of light, let's do shadows.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Show me your shadows.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right. Let's see. Here is...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: ...a shadow bird. Caw, caw, caw. You see its beak? Here, the shadow's up there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: This is how I make a bird.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, you do the wings, yes, like this. Flap, flap, flap, flap.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I do the wings.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You want to see my shadow puppy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It takes a while to get this one ready.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, llamas, yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, now it's time to turn the lamp back on and we'll get on...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, we can't do it right now, because I have...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: ...three more to show you that are very tricky.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, show me, show me.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a heart.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A heart.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I don't really see its shadow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Here, I can do mine and you'll see the shadow on the ceiling of the heart. There it is.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, I don't really see it - see the opening.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And I need more light on what I'm doing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Icicle
characters.description: A titanic and ancient white ice dragon, this towering companion to Dimitar commands the skies with freezing breath and vast, powerful wings. From a shimmering ice palace atop a remote mountain peak, he presides over his crystalline domain with a timeless and frigid majesty, sustained exclusively by a diet of frozen fish.

characters.name: Chicky
characters.description: A steadfast mole friend who served as the group’s living anchor, keeping everyone united through the simple, vital act of holding hands; they have been spirited away to a distant planet and now await a rescue to restore the broken chain.

characters.name: Security Cats
characters.description: The helpful hosts of the rainbow party who recently successfully rescued a stolen scallop shell.

characters.name: Uncle Bill
characters.description: A diligent crew member and master Lego architect, this former visitor to Balloon World crafts perfectly symmetrical stairways and shapes iridescent purple slime into glistening rocket ships. Renowned for a sharp eye that once pierced Pluto’s crystalline shadows, they recently turned their gaze toward the forest’s depths, acting as a compassionate friend to discover and tend to a sick creature hidden in the brush. Whether providing blocks for builders, weaving bedtime stories, or offering woodland mercy, they remain a helpful soul. Yet, between these moments of structural precision and quiet rescue, they harbor a penchant for deep rest, often found napping peacefully inside the colorful confines of a toy container, tucked away amidst the playthings they share.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Senexa
characters.description: A green-backed, green-winged dragon from Strawberry Island who brings tuna to share.

characters.name: The Floofers
characters.description: Tiny, pom-pom-like, and irrepressibly bouncy, these magical ball-shaped denizens of the Floofer Clouds leap with wide-eyed grace across resilient, vaporous peaks. Sustained by a vital dependency on floof-berries, these restless creatures possess a staggering verticality and a vibrant energy so potent that falling asleep remains an elusive feat.

characters.name: The Mookers
characters.description: Hailing from a neighboring planet, these toe-sized spheres of dense fur bear the uncanny features of miniature moose. They communicate through a rhythmic chorus of "mooks" and are defined by a singular, voracious obsession with sandwiches.

characters.name: Avery
characters.description: Now christened [Name], this diminutive mole is the newest addition to Izzy’s family and Hattie’s velvety baby sister. A tiny voyager often depicted in portraits wearing oversized clothes, she is a slumbering resident aboard the ship, finding bliss in milk-filled dreams within her cozy "house" upon the storyteller’s knee. To protect [Name]’s fragile rest, the crew maintains a state of hushed reverence, ensuring the vessel remains a quiet sanctuary for its smallest, most loyal passenger.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

characters.name: Mergirls
characters.description: Characters encountered on the long drive along the way to the playground.

characters.name: The Whale
characters.description: A thief who stole the precious scallop shell but was thwarted by the security cats.

places.name: Izzy's Bedroom
places.description: The place where the ceiling is transformed into a starry sky by a magic light.

places.name: Castlerock
places.description: The meeting place where Seeker first encountered the dragon Senexa.

places.name: Strawberry Island
places.description: The home of Zudy Dragon, known for having strawberries for every meal.

places.name: Playground
places.description: An outdoor area where students might make snow-canos.
